fields.description: Customer panicking — money gone but investment not showing.

analysis.summary: RVWXY6789Q - NAV not updated after successful payment
analysis.description: Customer panicking — money gone but investment not showing.

comments.body: AMC system maintenance window caused 24-hour delay in NAV allocation. Payment_received: true, nav_allocated: false in AMC status. Customer reassured. Units reflected after maintenance window.
comments.author: support-agent@fundsindia.com
